title: Week (March 25 - 29) in Review: Financial Leaders
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
In the last week of March, the financial markets witnessed a series of dynamic shifts and trends that have drawn the attention of investors and analysts alike. This review not only delves into the specifics of these changes but also sheds light on interesting facts that characterize the current financial landscape.

## Interesting Facts and Market Dynamics

A highlight of this period was the remarkable performance of cryptocurrencies, with Bitcoin Cash ([BCH.X](https://tickeron.com/ticker/BCH.X/signals/)) leading the charge, boasting an impressive gain of 35.56%. This surge is emblematic of the volatile yet rewarding nature of cryptocurrency investments. Litecoin ([LTC.X](https://tickeron.com/ticker/LTC.X/signals/)) and Bitcoin ([BTC.X](https://tickeron.com/ticker/BTC.X/signals/)) followed suit with significant upticks of 15.63% and 9.27%, respectively, underscoring the growing investor confidence in digital currencies amidst a fluctuating market.
